description: Building hands-on experience with microcontrollers, embedded C/C++, and sensor-based systems through practical experimentation.
Developing device control workflows using Arduino and ESP8266, focusing on real-time input handling and hardware-software integration.
Working with serial and WiFi communication while debugging low-level system behavior for reliability.
Strengthening fundamentals required for building real-world IoT systems.
Initiated and built a SaaS platform to solve inefficiencies in library operations such as rigid subscriptions and manual management.
Designed and developed the complete system (backend, frontend, database, deployment) independently.
Validated the product through direct interaction with multiple libraries and iterative feature improvements.
Identified adoption challenges including trust barriers and preference for manual workflows.
Paused the project after validation, applying learnings to improve product thinking and execution strategy.
Gained practical insights into product-market fit, requirement clarity, and real-world adoption challenges.
Developed backend services for SaaS applications using Node.js and Express.js.
Designed REST APIs for inventory, subscriptions, billing, and operational workflows.
Integrated payment gateways (Stripe, Razorpay) with secure webhook handling.
Worked on database design and query optimization using MongoDB and MySQL.
Collaborated with frontend and product teams for seamless feature integration.
Improved system performance, reliability, and maintainability through structured development practices.
Assisted in API development, testing, and debugging within backend workflows.
Worked with Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and Postman in a production-oriented environment.
Learned to translate requirements into structured backend logic under guidance.
Built foundational skills in backend architecture, debugging, and team collaboration.
